messages.body: Hello? Yes, can I ask you? Hi, my name is Kripali. I'm part of the founding team here at Zoka. Do you remember that you used to work with us some time ago, Hannah? What do you say? Zoka? Yes, and? Yes, so I understand th…
Hey John,  Sure, we’ll proceed with the cancellation of your account.   We will be removing the Zoca landing page from your Google.
I would like to cancel for now.   Let me know if you will put back my original web link in google map.      Thanks.

Hello John,  Hope you’re doing well :)  Never heard back from you regarding my above message. Please let me know if you’re willing to reconsider your options.  If not, I will inform the team to cancel your account.

Hi John,  I’ve been thinking about our conversation, and I want to make sure you feel supported. If there’s anything more I can do to help you on the financial side, please tell me. I don’t want you to feel stressed or o…
Thanks but i think we will terminate the service for now.

Hi John,  I hope you’ve been doing well.  Following our recent conversation, I spoke with my management team, and we’d be happy to offer you the service at a discounted rate of $199 for the next three months — November, …
Oh that’s amazing! Thank you so John! Happy Diwali to you and your fam too :)
Happy Dawalli!  We celebrated it on Wednesday lat week in office.

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major festival here in India, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to sch…
We will not be able to post this. Google suspense, any account, if you incentivise them for reviews.
These work. Thank you :)
Also, offer 15% discount if post Boo-tiful review on Google
Can I get a nice picture so we add it along with this to the website?
I dont have customers pic at this tine

Hey John,  It was lovely speaking with you :)   Please share the offers with me so I can get them added on the website and start Google post around them. I’ll be waiting for this.   As discussed, we’ll connect next on 31…
Some more

Costume Combo Discount  Offer a 20% discount to customers who come in costume or share a photo of their Halloween look featuring your lashes to post on Google.    Halloween Gift Card Discount  Spooky Offer - 25% discount…
Like this?
Ok
I can do Wednesday at 930am or thurs at 9am.  Let me know.
Hello!  Let’s do Thursday 9 am. Here’s the link - http://meet.google.com/wwc-yenr-oes
Hi  Is 9am pst works for monday?
Hello John,  Today is difficult. Can we do tomorrow at 9 am?
